# PERF-054 negative: pooled strings.Builder reset between uses
lang: go
file: PERF-054-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var builderPool = sync.Pool{
	New: func() any { return &strings.Builder{} },
}

func BuildPathSafe(c *gin.Context) {
	b := builderPool.Get().(*strings.Builder)
	b.Reset()
	for _, seg := range []string{"a", "b", "c"} {
		b.WriteString(seg)
		b.WriteString("/")
	}
	out := b.String()
	builderPool.Put(b)
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"path": out})
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
